title: Azure Firewall rule-collection posture
description: Per-firewall-policy network-perimeter posture captured read-only from Azure Resource Manager (ARM Reader role): the firewall policy's rule-collection groups (with their priority ordering) and, inside each group, the network + application rule collections (collection action allow/deny, priority, and per-rule metadata: protocols, source/destination address prefixes, destination ports for network rules, and target FQDNs for application rules). Azure Firewall is a centralized policy-based L3-L7 boundary-protection control point — a sibling to the per-subnet/per-NIC NSG kind — so it answers the network-segmentation question at the network-perimeter grain (e.g. no rule collection allows traffic from the whole Internet to management ports 22/3389). RULE configuration only — NEVER flow logs, packet captures, traffic contents, NAT-rule secrets, threat-intel feeds, or route tables; the connector never mutates a network resource (read-only list). The platform evaluator decides pass/fail per (control, firewall policy); the connector emits a descriptive default verdict. x-default-scf-anchors are default mapping hints flagged for maintainer recheck (OQ #9).

policy_id.description: ARM resource id of the firewall policy.

subscription_id.description: Subscription the firewall policy lives in.

resource_group.description: Resource group containing the firewall policy.

location.description: Azure region of the firewall policy.

rule_collection_groups.description: The policy's rule-collection groups, in their priority ordering. RULE configuration only.

priority.description: Rule-collection-group priority (lower evaluates first) — the ordering signal.

rule_collections.description: The network / application rule collections in this group.

type.description: Whether this collection holds network rules or application rules (empty when the collection carries no rules to infer from).

priority.description: Collection priority within its group (lower evaluates first).

rules.description: The collection's rules. RULE metadata only.

protocols.description: Protocols the rule matches (network: tcp/udp/icmp/any; application: http/https/mssql).

source_addresses.description: Source address prefixes / tags the rule matches (e.g. 203.0.113.0/24, Internet, *).

destination_addresses.description: Destination address prefixes the rule matches (network rules).

destination_ports.description: Destination port ranges the rule matches (network rules; e.g. 22, 0-65535, *).

destination_fqdns.description: Target FQDNs the rule matches (application rules).
